reasoning: The market price on Oct 16 (12%) indicates OpenAI is not favored to hold the top spot on the leaderboard by the end of the year. During late October (e.g., Oct 22), Anthropic released the updated Claude 3.5 Sonnet which performed extremely well, potentially further reducing OpenAI's lead unless they release a new model before the end of the year, which the market doesn't seem to heavily price in. Without recent search data available, anchored to the provided 12% market baseline, I estimate 11% to account for competitive model drops like the new Claude 3.5 Sonnet that further challenge OpenAI's position.
